response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable IDE/developer tools experience from his National Instruments role building LabWindows/CVI and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals through TDD and system design practices. However, he has spent the past four years focused on TypeScript/Node.js rather than Java/Kotlin, with his last Java work at Altom in 2016-2018. There is no evidence of expertise with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or other enterprise frameworks essential to this role, nor any mention of build tools or application server integration. His career trajectory diverges from enterprise Java tooling rather than toward it.
strengths: Direct IDE development experience from National Instruments building developer tools (LabWindows/CVI for C engineers)
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, clean architecture, and ownership of complex systems across multiple companies
Proven ability to design and evolve large-scale systems with architectural thinking demonstrated through GISCollective and multi-team leadership
concerns: No recent Java work—last four years entirely TypeScript/Node.js; Java experience limited to 2016-2018 robotic arm work at Altom
No evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, Kotlin, Maven, Gradle, or enterprise framework expertise despite their centrality to the role
Career trajectory diverges from enterprise Java/JVM tooling over past four years; recent focus on web platforms, AI infrastructure, and MCP suggests different technical interests

key_factors.factor: IDE/developer tools background from National Instruments
Four-year absence from Java/JVM ecosystem and no Spring experience
Strong system design and software engineering practices
